data.body: Done (commit 8bc485c8). get_prompt unified resolver + Prompt dataclass; get_reviewer removed (grep-clean), all 8 callers migrated; 6 reviewers migrated to front-matter (category:review, execution_mode:agentic, bodies byte-identical); catalog.json -> generated reviewers/index.json with invariants (exactly-one-default + no dimension collision, both rejection-tested; retire path tested); CI Prompt-index drift gate added. 329 tests green incl equivalence (test_llm_framework) + 11 new index/resolver tests. Verified: grep-clean, drift gate stable, prompts.py 671 LOC under cap.
